name: lock file validator rejects a sections list with fewer than fifteen entries
command: printf '{"plugin_version":"1.9.0","_meta":{"sections":["rubric","detectors"]}}\n' > lock.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-lock.sh" --lock lock.json --check sections 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'sections_count=2' err.txt && grep -q 'expected=15' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
